data.name: label3.Text
data.value:
Finding ‘Nimo’ or ‘Finding Yourself’ is a game not only to provide entertainment but also to connect with human emotions, especially when stress, anxiety, and emotional struggles are common among youth and adults alike. It is a therapeutic, text- based role-playing game (RPG) that combines programming with storytelling to create an interactive space where players can reflect, cope, grow, and find themselves within the game. It aims to depict real-life events a person could encounter and how they could overcome them.
Finding ‘Nimo’ aims to accomplish the following objectives:
> Redesign the former ASCII‑based project into a therapeutic RPG created with 2D sprite-based game design, integrating side- scrolling mechanics and immersive elements to enhance player experience.
> Align with the SDG Goal 3 (Good Health and Well-Being), encouraging mental health awareness through gameplay, as well as supporting Goal 4 (Quality Education) through interactive learning.
> Promote easy access to players with limited resources, allowing them to run on lightweight systems.
> Challenge and encourage players to make meaningful choices that could shape the story’s journey, outcomes, and endings.
